'''âd-p-sh''' ('''kadapash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lurv|lurv]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lurv|lurv]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-p-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kadapash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidapash|thidapash]] || [[word:jidapash|jidapash]] || [[word:shidapash|shidapash]] || [[word:kidapash|kidapash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudapash|thuthudapash]] || [[word:jujudapash|jujudapash]] || [[word:shushudapash|shushudapash]] || [[word:kukudapash|kukudapash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudapash|thudapash]] || [[word:judapash|judapash]] || [[word:shudapash|shudapash]] || [[word:kudapash|kudapash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudapash|thudapash]] || [[word:judapash|judapash]] || [[word:shudapash|shudapash]] || [[word:kudapash|kudapash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedapash|thedapash]] || [[word:jedapash|jedapash]] || [[word:shedapash|shedapash]] || [[word:kedapash|kedapash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodapash|thothodapash]] || [[word:jojodapash|jojodapash]] || [[word:shoshodapash|shoshodapash]] || [[word:kokodapash|kokodapash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodapash|thodapash]] || [[word:jodapash|jodapash]] || [[word:shodapash|shodapash]] || [[word:kodapash|kodapash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodapash|thodapash]] || [[word:jodapash|jodapash]] || [[word:shodapash|shodapash]] || [[word:kodapash|kodapash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdapash|thĂŠdapash]] || [[word:jĂŠdapash|jĂŠdapash]] || [[word:shĂŠdapash|shĂŠdapash]] || [[word:kĂŠdapash|kĂŠdapash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadapash|thathadapash]] || [[word:jajadapash|jajadapash]] || [[word:shashadapash|shashadapash]] || [[word:kakadapash|kakadapash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadapash|thadapash]] || [[word:jadapash|jadapash]] || [[word:shadapash|shadapash]] || [[word:kadapash|kadapash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadapash|thadapash]] || [[word:jadapash|jadapash]] || [[word:shadapash|shadapash]] || [[word:kadapash|kadapash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadapash|shadapash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadapash|goshadapash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadapash|gokishadapash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadapashnĂŒ|shadapashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadapashnknĂŒ|goshadapashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapashnĂŒ|gokishadapashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadapashĂ«|shadapashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadapashnkshĂ«|goshadapashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadapashĂ«|gokishadapashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapashro|shadapashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapashnkro|goshadapashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapashro|gokishadapashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapashmu|shadapashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapashnkmu|goshadapashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapashmu|gokishadapashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadapasher|shadapasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadapashnksher|goshadapashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadapasher|gokishadapasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadapashng|shadapashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadapashnkng|goshadapashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadapashng|gokishadapashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadapashya|shadapashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadapashnkya|goshadapashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadapashya|gokishadapashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadapashyam|shadapashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadapashnkyam|goshadapashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadapashyam|gokishadapashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadapashnĂŒshĂ«|shadapashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadapashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadapashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadapashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadapashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapashnĂŒro|shadapashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapashnknĂŒro|goshadapashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapashnĂŒro|gokishadapashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapashnĂŒmu|shadapashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapashnknĂŒmu|goshadapashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapashnĂŒmu|gokishadapashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadapashĂ«nĂŒ|shadapashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadapashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadapashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadapashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapashĂ«ro|shadapashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapashnkshĂ«ro|goshadapashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapashĂ«ro|gokishadapashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapashĂ«mu|shadapashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapashnkshĂ«mu|goshadapashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapashĂ«mu|gokishadapashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadapashronĂŒ|shadapashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadapashnkronĂŒ|goshadapashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapashronĂŒ|gokishadapashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadapashroshĂ«|shadapashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadapashnkroshĂ«|goshadapashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadapashroshĂ«|gokishadapashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapashromu|shadapashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapashnkromu|goshadapashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapashromu|gokishadapashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadapashmunĂŒ|shadapashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadapashnkmunĂŒ|goshadapashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapashmunĂŒ|gokishadapashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadapashmushĂ«|shadapashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadapashnkmushĂ«|goshadapashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadapashmushĂ«|gokishadapashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapashmuro|shadapashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapashnkmuro|goshadapashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapashmuro|gokishadapashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
